_note: Baseline counts of axe-core violations as of v1.7.4. The CI gate fails when any critical/serious rule INCREASES vs these numbers. Refresh by re-running `A11Y_REBASELINE=1 COVERAGE=1 ./run-tests.sh` and copying the printed JSON over this file (after fixing some violations or accepting the new shape). Don't lower these numbers without an actual fix — the gate would lock in the new lower bound.
